purpose: Define the minimum non-oracle event_entry v2 contract before any monthly/meta/late-era rebuild. This is a research contract, not a live source.
allowed_inputs: features computed only from closed bars at or before the decision timestamp
documented fee, slippage, funding, leverage, and return timing assumptions
forbidden_inputs: final component labels used as builder inputs
replayed fullscan rows as a forward builder
live account state, open orders, supervisor state, secrets, keys, tokens, or .env values

non_oracle_gate: builder code regenerates signals from closed bars
no reference label, final label, or replay artifact is used as an input
timestamps are sorted, unique, timezone-aware, and bar-close aligned
economic_gate: 2026 return is at least 100.0% on latest available YTD closed-bar data until full 2026 is complete
fee, slippage, funding, leverage, and return timing are locked before comparison
lineage_gate: fresh selected_signals are produced from the v2 builder
fresh regime_stack is rebuilt from v2 selected_signals
fresh monthly_activity replay/builder is rebuilt from the new lineage
fresh meta_feature_pool_robust selected_signals, walk_forward_predictions, candidate_segment_index, and candidate_trade_dataset are rebuilt
fresh late_era_walk_forward_anchor is rebuilt from the fresh robust pool
live_gate: observe-only source is built and validated
non-overlap, stop, kill-switch, and reconciliation acceptance pass
explicit user confirmation is present before any live switch

required_year_scopes.2025: full calendar year when full 2025 data is available
required_year_scopes.2026: year-to-date through the latest available closed bar until full 2026 is complete

candidate_design_guidance: use a stateful primary/supplement combiner rather than one-shot threshold overlays
test primary continuation or re-entry as a separate state machine, not as direct reference-row patching
test supplement dip/reversion as its own closed-bar rule family
keep breakout20 as at most one component because standalone breakout v0 was rejected economically
only rebuild downstream after a candidate passes non-oracle, row, economic, and lineage gates
